'''fawara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabumba|zabumba]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabumba|zabumba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| fawara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæwæræth|fæwæræth]] || [[word:fæwæræj|fæwæræj]] || [[word:fæwæræsh|fæwæræsh]] || [[word:fæwæræ|fæwæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fawawarath|fawawarath]] || [[word:fawawaraj|fawawaraj]] || [[word:fawawarash|fawawarash]] || [[word:fawawara|fawawara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fawarath|fawarath]] || [[word:fawaraj|fawaraj]] || [[word:fawarash|fawarash]] || [[word:fawara|fawara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fawafrath|fawafrath]] || [[word:fawafraj|fawafraj]] || [[word:fawafrash|fawafrash]] || [[word:fawafraf|fawafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fawaratha|fawaratha]] || [[word:fawaraja|fawaraja]] || [[word:fawarasha|fawarasha]] || [[word:fawaraka|fawaraka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fawarath|fawarath]] || [[word:fawaraj|fawaraj]] || [[word:fawarash|fawarash]] || [[word:fawara|fawara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fawarathal|fawarathal]] || [[word:fawarajal|fawarajal]] || [[word:fawarashal|fawarashal]] || [[word:fawarakal|fawarakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fawarathatha|fawarathatha]] || [[word:fawarajaja|fawarajaja]] || [[word:fawarashasha|fawarashasha]] || [[word:fawaraka|fawaraka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fawarathan|fawarathan]] || [[word:fawarajan|fawarajan]] || [[word:fawarashan|fawarashan]] || [[word:fawarakan|fawarakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fawarathaoro|fawarathaoro]] || [[word:fawarajaoro|fawarajaoro]] || [[word:fawarashaoro|fawarashaoro]] || [[word:fawarakaoro|fawarakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
